title: Pushable By Entity
description: Allows an entity to be pushed by other entities.

presets.title: Presets
presets.description: Allows customization of push behavior per entity type

filter.title: Filters
filter.description: Conditions that must be met for the preset to be applied

strength_multiplier.title: Strength Multiplier
strength_multiplier.description: Scales the push force applied to the entity

min_distance.title: Min Distance
min_distance.description: Minimum distance between entities for push forces to be applied

max_distance.title: Max Distance
max_distance.description: Controls the maximum range at which push interactions can occur for all push_mode values

push_scale_self.title: Push Scale Self
push_scale_self.description: Scales how much push force this entity applies to itself away on collision

push_scale_other.title: Push Scale Other
push_scale_other.description: Scales how much push force this entity applies to the other entity on collision

play_sound.title: Play Sound
play_sound.description: Control whether the pushed_by_player sound is played

play_sound_cooldown_in_seconds.title: Play Sound Cooldown In Seconds
play_sound_cooldown_in_seconds.description: Cooldown in seconds between sounds, a lower number results in more sounds

play_sound_impulse_threshold.title: Play Sound Impulse Threshold
play_sound_impulse_threshold.description: Minimum change of velocity needed to trigger the push sound, a lower value means higher sensitivity
